## dropdownButton() function

Create a button widget with multiple selectable options, which can be selected from a dropdown on the right side of the button.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function dropdownButton(params: DropdownButtonParams & FlexiblePosition): WidgetCreator<FlexiblePosition>;
```
